problem id: 6e80733d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3)

examples:
  01001010 -> 01010010
  11110001 -> 10001111
  00000010 -> 00010000
  00010000 -> 10000000
  11101110 -> 01110111
  01111011 -> 11011011
  11011000 -> 11000110
  01000111 -> 00111010

query: 00001001
predicted answer: 01001000
